name: Windward Mall Farmers Market
tagline: Air-conditioned indoor market every Wednesday — exceptional prepared foods reflecting the true diversity of Windward Oahu.
bestTime: Go hungry — the prepared food stalls (smoked fish, poke, mango sticky rice, ube pastry) are outstanding
talkStory: This fully air-conditioned Wednesday market inside Windward Mall is a lifesaver during Kaneohe's frequent rain showers. The prepared food stalls reflect the Windward side's deep Pacific Island and Asian diversity -- Tongan-style smoked fish, Japanese bento, Thai mango sticky rice, and Hawaiian poi sit side by side. Kaneohe families treat this as their weekly grocery-and-dinner run. It's as local as it gets -- you won't see another tourist here.
